ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gpu_models" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the GPU */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Memory size of the GPU */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the GPU */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the GPU model */,
  "clock_speed" INTEGER /* Clock speed of the GPU in MHz */,
  "power_consumption" INTEGER /* Power consumption of the GPU in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_types" (
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision type */,
  "precision_name" TEXT /* Name of the precision type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_sizes" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch size */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GPU model */,
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precision type */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch size */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the GPU configuration */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the performance test in seconds */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test conditions or setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_precision_id FOREIGN KEY ("precision_id") REFERENCES precision_types ("precision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batch_sizes ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpu_models ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, regular user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission the user has */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the access level */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the user's access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GPU model */,
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precision type */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch size */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted performance score for the GPU configuration */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_precision_id FOREIGN KEY ("precision_id") REFERENCES precision_types ("precision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batch_sizes ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpu_models ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "validation_score" INTEGER /* Validation score of the metric */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who validated the metric */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the validator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., manufacturer, independent test lab) */,
  "source_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability score for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_sources" (
  "metric_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship between a metric and a source */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
